title: Operation Executive (3PL / MNC)
description:
Industry: Logistics

MNC Environment

Location: East


Responsibilities:

  • Assist Manager to lead and manage a team of warehouse and administration personnel to ensure that services provided meet customer’s requirements.
  • Deal closely with customer professionally to resolve any inquiries or issues.
  • Generate and submit reports (ie KPI, QBR) timely and accurately.
  • Generate accurately and submit promptly monthly billing for approval within the deadline.
  • Ensure team conformance to all HSE, Security, 5S and quality standards.
  • Ensure team compliance to operational processes or customer’s specified requirement.
  • Raise and track Purchase Requisition (PR) for consumables and packaging materials purchase.
  • Raise and monitor Change Requests (CR) when needed.
  • Analyze performance and activity indicators to identify improvement opportunities.
  • Perform process mapping on new or changed business requirements.
  • Own stop shipment and inventory reconciliation processes to meet all requirements.
  • Assist Manager to manage headcount and overtime to meet operational and financial KPI.
  • Drive cost saving and productivity initiatives to meet Company’s and customer’s objectives.
  • Work with Quality Executive to identify process gaps, develop and execute improvement actions to resolve Quality issues.
  • Work with Quality Executives to close off any NCRs/ CAPAs/ Customer complaints/ audit actions/ non-conformance within the stated timeline.
  • Work on all system testing/upgrade with all internal and/or external stakeholders.


Requirements:

  • Preferably 3 years of related experience
  • Good in Microsoft Office Suite (e.g. Excel, Powerpoint, Outlook, VBA)
  • Experience in using and creating operations dashboards (e.g.PowerBI, Tableau) is an added advantage
  • Able to communicate effectively with internal / external customers.

Job ID: QWY37Y79

All Successful candidates can expect a very competitive remuneration package and a comprehensive range of benefits.

Kindly email your resume in a detailed Word format to carlo@peopleprofilers.com

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified


People Profilers Pte Ltd

20 Cecil Street, #08-09 PLUS Building Singapore 049705

+65 6950 9747


EA Licence Number: 02C4944

Registration Number: R1100011

EA Personnel: Carlo Antonio Dela Cruz

postedCompany.description:
Since our humble beginnings in 2002, People Profilers has steadily grown from strength to strength. Our expertise in providing Human Capital consultancy to our clients – universally sought after skills and expertise in just about any sector– has allowed People Profilers to leave an imprint across various industries and build a reputation for competency and expertise.

 

What differentiates People Profilers from every other recruiter is our unwavering commitment to building relationships with our clients- understanding exactly what our clients are after, and allowing us to match their precise needs. We deliver human capital solutions that allow organisations and their employees to succeed.

 

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
